message:
feat: add icon support, auto-backup, and fix multi-edge routing

- Icon/emoji support: `icon` field on ShapeOpts resolves preset names
  (database, cloud, server, k8s, etc.) to emoji or accepts raw emoji,
  prepended above the label
- Auto-backup: `.excalidraw` and `.drawmode.ts` files get a `.bak` copy
  before being overwritten by render()
- Multi-edge fix: extractSplineFromEdge() in layout.zig uses stored edge
  pointers directly instead of searching by head node name, so parallel
  edges between the same node pair get distinct spline routes
- Visual regression test infrastructure with PNG snapshot baselines

files.patch:
@@ -13,6 +13,9 @@ diagram.*
 test-output.*
 test.svg
 
+# Visual regression test diffs
+src/__snapshots__/diffs/
+
 # Environment
 .env
